# ערן סמולר - מנהל פרוייקטים בדיגיטל — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A personal referral campaign page for Eran Smoler, a project manager at Excellence Trade (אקסלנס טרייד), a leading Israeli investment house. Eran has been both a client and employee since March 2020, giving him a unique insider-outsider perspective on the platform. The page promotes a 'refer a friend' program for opening brokerage accounts, emphasizing ease, affordability, and trust. The brand narrative is warm and personal — driven by a genuine belief in the product built from years of hands-on experience, highlighting that great products are built through real user listening. Key links include digital account opening, children's accounts, and fast deposits.

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About ערן סמולר - מנהל פרוייקטים בדיגיטל
A personal referral campaign page for Eran Smoler, a project manager at Excellence Trade (אקסלנס טרייד), a leading Israeli investment house. Eran has been both a client and employee since March 2020, giving him a unique insider-outsider perspective on the platform. The page promotes a 'refer a friend' program for opening brokerage accounts, emphasizing ease, affordability, and trust. The brand narrative is warm and personal — driven by a genuine belief in the product built from years of hands-on experience, highlighting that great products are built through real user listening. Key links include digital account opening, children's accounts, and fast deposits.

## Target Audience
- חברים ומשפחה המעוניינים לפתוח חשבון השקעות, משקיעים מתחילים המחפשים פתרון קל וזול למסחר בבורסה
- חברים ובני משפחה משקיעים
- משקיעים צעירים מקצועיים
- משקיעים טכנולוגיים

## Industry
שוק ההון, השקעות, מסחר בבורסה

---
